string.text:
Improves fast-travel sneak odds, speeds up PDA map travel, and increases ambush spawn distance.
 
Levels are gained by sneaking past threats during travel and completing sneak journeys.
$clr_green* $clr_whiteFast-travel sneak bonus improved\n$clr_cyan* $clr_whitePDA travel speed increased\n$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteAmbush spawn distance increased
